headline: Will Expectations For A Better Combined Ratio Redefine Allstate's (ALL) Earnings Quality Narrative?
summary: In late April 2026, analysts highlighted Allstate’s upcoming quarterly earnings report, expecting stronger year-on-year earnings per share alongside improving core insurance metrics such as net premiums earned and protection services revenue. Commentary also pointed to an anticipated better Property-Liability combined ratio and a possible earnings beat, suggesting growing attention on Allstate’s underwriting performance and operational efficiency.
